title: ### A.1 Core Screen Hierarchy
content:
### A.1 Core Screen Hierarchy

```
ROOT CONTAINER
├── Onboarding Sequence (First Launch)
│ ├── Welcome Screen
│ ├── Archetype Selection
│ ├── Initial Calibration
│ └── Tutorial Overlay
├── Main Interaction Space
│ ├── Environment Layer (Persistent)
│ ├── Avatar Display Zone
│ ├── Conversation Interface
│ └── Metrics HUD (Toggle)
├── Analysis Views
│ ├── Session Review
│ ├── Progress Dashboard
│ └── Perspective Replay
└── Settings & Customization
├── Avatar Preferences
├── Environment Themes
├── RTM Configuration
└── Privacy Controls
```

### A.2 Detailed Screen Specifications

#### **Screen 1: Archetype Selection**

```yaml
Layout:
Type: Grid (3x2)
Background: Soft gradient with particle effects
Components:
ArchetypeCard:
Dimensions: 280x400px (mobile) / 320x480px (desktop)
context: From document: # Platform-Agnostic UI Architecture: Project Evolve — chunk 7 (chunk 7/10)
